stemHtml: A large jet transport aeroplane has an inoperative anti-skid system. Which performance calculations must the flight crew redo and how will they change?

options.a: The take-off and landing distances required will be increased.
options.b: The take-off distance required will be increased.
options.c: The landing distance required will be increased.
options.d: The take-off distance required will decrease and landing distance required will be increased.
